case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMWEST SUREY INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMWEST SUREY INSURANCE COMPANY HALL BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMWEST SUREY INSURANCE COMPANY HALL BAIL BONDS $17,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,583.00

CASH SUBSTITUTION OF SURETY BONDS. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
